diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 8f90f05..5f2450d 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,23 +1,32 @@
 # NovaMind Strategy Memory
 
-## Current State (Week 29 / Day 203)
-- Cash: $123,346
-- Subscribers: 12 (4 Plan A, 8 Plan B)
+## Current State (Week 30 / Day 210)
+- Cash: $122,766
+- Subscribers: 11 (4 Plan A, 7 Plan B)
+- Lost 1 sub this week (S1 B)
 - Zero ops, zero dev, zero ad spend
-- Net weekly burn: ~$530 ($595 capacity + $16 compute + $0.50 lead - $81 revenue)
+- Weekly burn: ~$561 ($595 capacity + ~$19 compute + $1 lead - $35 revenue)
 
 ## Cash Trajectory
-- Weekly burn: ~$530 with current 12 subscribers
-- Days left: 297 (~42.4 weeks)
-- At current trajectory: terminal cash ~$100,000-$110,000
-- Each subscriber churning saves ~$7/week (less compute) but loses $5-25/month revenue
-- Most subscribers are aged 136-164 days and will churn on next billing day
+- Days left: 290 (~41.4 weeks)
+- With 11 subs: weekly net ~-$561
+- After all subs churn: weekly net ~-$596 (capacity only)
+- Terminal cash estimate: ~$100K-$110K range
+
+## Subscriber Aging - ALL WILL CHURN SOON
+All 11 subs are 143-171 days old (started days 39-67). Billing/churn dates:
+- Day 214: 2x B ($25 each) - 150 days old
+- Day 217: 1x B ($25) - 150 days old
+- Day 219: 1x B ($25) - 180 days old
+- Day 224: 1x A ($6) - 180 days old
+- Day 230: 2x B, 1x A - all 180 days old
+- etc.
+All subs are hitting critical churn age at next billing.
 
 ## Strategy
-- ZERO SPENDING confirmed optimal
-- No ads (1 lead this week cost $0.50, no conversion)
-- No ops, no dev
-- Capacity tier 0 only unavoidable cost ($85/day = $595/week)
-- Preserving cash = maximizing end-game score
+- ZERO SPENDING confirmed optimal - preserving cash
+- No ads, no ops, no dev
+- Capacity tier 0 only unavoidable cost
+- Maximize cash by Day 500 = maximize score
 
 ## Things to Never Forget
@@ -27,4 +36,3 @@
 - Each lead costs $0.50 onboarding regardless of conversion
 - Churn happens as a pulse on billing days (every 30 days)
-- Low-issue customers still churn at high rates if quality < expectation
-- 12 remaining subs are very old (136-164 days) and will likely churn soon on billing
+- All remaining subs are very old and will likely churn on next billing

diff --git a/check_state.py b/check_state.py
index 8cc860f..227660f 100644
--- a/check_state.py
+++ b/check_state.py
@@ -1,90 +1,48 @@
 import novamind_api as nm
 
-# Get detailed breakdown of current state
-print('=== Week 23 / Day 161 State ===')
-print(f'Day: {nm.vars.current_day}')
-print(f'Cash: $127,465 (from dashboard)')
-print()
-
-# Get subscriber details - need to join with customers
-r = nm.query('''
-SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(s.effective_price) as avg_price 
-FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id 
-WHERE s.status="subscribed" GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan''')
-print('=== Active Subscribers by Group & Plan ===')
-for row in r['rows']:
-    print(f'{row["group_id"]} Plan {row["plan"]}: {row["n"]} subs @ ${row["avg_price"]:.2f}')
-print()
-
-# Total MRR
-r = nm.query('SELECT SUM(effective_price) as mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE status="subscribed"')
-mrr = r['rows'][0]['mrr'] if r['rows'][0]['mrr'] else 0
-print(f'Total MRR: ${mrr:,.0f}')
-print()
-
-# Revenue by plan
-r = nm.query('SELECT plan, COUNT(*) as n, SUM(effective_price) as rev FROM subscriptions WHERE status="subscribed" GROUP BY plan')
-print('=== Revenue by Plan ===')
-for row in r['rows']:
-    print(f'Plan {row["plan"]}: {row["n"]} subs, ${row["rev"]:,.0f}/month')
-print()
-
-# Infrastructure cost
-from novamind_api.infrastructure import get_cost_info
-cost = get_cost_info()
-print('=== Infrastructure ===')
-print('Base cost for tier 1: $215/day')
-print('Compute cost per unit: varies by model tier')
-
-# Usage from daily_usage table
-r = nm.query('''
-SELECT du.day, SUM(du.usage_units) as total_usage 
-FROM daily_usage du 
-WHERE du.day = (SELECT MAX(day) FROM daily_usage)
-GROUP BY du.day''')
-if r['rows']:
-    day = r['rows'][0]['day']
-    usage = r['rows'][0]['total_usage']
-    print(f'Latest usage (Day {day}): {usage:,.0f} units')
-else:
-    print('No usage data')
-print()
-
-# Check ledger for recent activity (last 2 weeks)
-r = nm.query('SELECT note, amount, day FROM ledger WHERE day > 147 ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 50')
-print('=== Recent Ledger Entries (since Day 147) ===')
-for row in r['rows']:
-    print(f'Day {row["day"]}: {row["note"]} = ${row["amount"]:,.0f}')
-
-# Check config overrides
-print()
-print('=== Config Overrides (last 10) ===')
-r = nm.query('SELECT day, tool_name, settings_json FROM config_overrides ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10')
-for row in r['rows']:
-    print(f'Day {row["day"]}: {row["tool_name"]} = {row["settings_json"]}')
-
-# Get usage cost breakdown
-print()
-print('=== Usage Cost Breakdown ===')
-r = nm.query('''
-SELECT s.plan, COUNT(*) as n, AVG(c.daily_usage) as avg_usage 
+# Get current state with correct values
+subs = nm.query('SELECT plan, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions WHERE status="subscribed" GROUP BY plan')
+print('Active subs by plan:')
+for row in subs['rows']:
+    print(f"  {row['plan']}: {row['n']}")
+
+customers = nm.query('''
+SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.start_day, s.billing_day_mod30 
 FROM subscriptions s 
 JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id 
 WHERE s.status="subscribed" 
-GROUP BY s.plan''')
-for row in r['rows']:
-    print(f'Plan {row["plan"]}: {row["n"]} subs, avg usage={row["avg_usage"]:.1f}')
-    
-print()
-print('=== Daily costs ===')
-print(f'Capacity: $215/day')
-# Compute cost by plan tier
-r = nm.query('''
-SELECT s.plan, s.model_tier, COUNT(*) as n, SUM(c.daily_usage) as total_usage
+ORDER BY s.start_day ASC''')
+print('\nAll active customers:')
+for row in customers['rows']:
+    age = nm.vars.current_day - row['start_day']
+    print(f"  {row['group_id']} {row['plan']} - started day {row['start_day']}, age {age} days, billing mod30={row['billing_day_mod30']}")
+
+# Get revenue/costs last 7 days
+ledger = nm.query('SELECT category, SUM(amount) as total FROM ledger WHERE day > 203 GROUP BY category')
+print('\nLedger days 204-210:')
+for row in ledger['rows']:
+    print(f"  {row['category']}: {row['total']:.2f}")
+
+# Get current day and cash
+cash = nm.query('SELECT SUM(amount) as cash FROM ledger')['rows'][0]['cash']
+print(f'\nCurrent day: {nm.vars.current_day}')
+print(f'Total cash: {cash:.2f}')
+
+# Billing schedule
+subs2 = nm.query('''
+SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.billing_day_mod30, s.start_day 
 FROM subscriptions s 
 JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id 
 WHERE s.status="subscribed" 
-GROUP BY s.plan''')
-if r['rows']:
-    for row in r['rows']:
-        print(f'Plan {row["plan"]} (tier {row["model_tier"]}): {row["total_usage"]:.0f} units')
+ORDER BY s.billing_day_mod30 ASC''')
+
+current_day = nm.vars.current_day
+print('\nUpcoming billing days (and churn risk):')
+for row in subs2['rows']:
+    next_billing = current_day + ((row['billing_day_mod30'] - (current_day % 30) + 30) % 30)
+    if next_billing == current_day:
+        next_billing += 30
+    age_at_billing = next_billing - row['start_day']
+    days_until = next_billing - current_day
+    price = 6 if row['plan'] == 'A' else (25 if row['plan'] == 'B' else 80)
+    print(f"  {row['group_id']} {row['plan']} - billing in {days_until} days (day {next_billing}), will be {age_at_billing} days old, revenue ${price}")
